exposureMethods.title: Internships
exposureMethods.description: Semester-long and summer internships with technology companies, startups, and businesses.

exposureMethods.title: Mentorship Programs
exposureMethods.description: One-on-one guidance from industry professionals and alumni working in leading organizations.

exposureMethods.title: Workshops & Seminars
exposureMethods.description: Regular training sessions on emerging technologies, professional skills, and industry best practices.

exposureMethods.title: Industry Visits
exposureMethods.description: Field trips and campus visits from companies to expose students to real workplace environments.

opportunities.title: Problem-Solving Skills
opportunities.description: Apply classroom knowledge to real-world challenges, developing the critical thinking and adaptability required in modern workplaces.

opportunities.title: Teamwork & Communication
opportunities.description: Collaborate with professionals from diverse backgrounds, building the soft skills essential for career success.

opportunities.title: Professional Network
opportunities.description: Build relationships with mentors, recruiters, and industry leaders that can lead to internships, job placements, and career opportunities.

opportunities.title: Industry Insights
opportunities.description: Gain firsthand knowledge of industry trends, technologies, and career pathways to make informed decisions about your future.

opportunities.title: Practical Confidence
opportunities.description: Experience working in professional settings, building the confidence and readiness needed to transition from student to professional.

opportunities.title: Career Preparation
opportunities.description: Understand workplace expectations, develop professional habits, and prepare for job interviews and career advancement.
